reasoning: The control 'Learn what information resides on your network' emphasizes understanding and controlling access to information within a network. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring network policies are in place to restrict ingress and egress traffic, enforcing RBAC for least privilege access, and enabling audit logging to monitor and understand what actions are being performed within the cluster. These checks help ensure that information within the Kubernetes environment is well-protected and access is controlled.
title: Learn what information resides on your network
